Let’s Talk

About

Executive Profile

Development and Programme Management Professional with 16+ years of progressive experience delivering high-impact development programmes through leading national and international NGOs. Throughout my career, I have successfully implemented projects funded by the World Bank, PKSF, USAID, Hempel Foundation (Denmark), Andheri Hilfe (Germany), Bread for the World (Germany), Shiree (DFID-UK), the Kingdom of the Netherlands, CIDA (Canada), and other development partners, while working closely with organizations including Save the Children and World Vision.

Demonstrated expertise in Programme Management, MEAL (Monitoring, Evaluation, Accountability and Learning), Enterprise Development, Market Systems Development (MSD), Market Linkage, Value Chain Development, Sustainable Supply Chain Management, Business Development Services (BDS), Youth Employment Promotion, Job Placement of Apprenticeship, Private Sector Engagement, Community Outreach, Case Management, Psychometric Profiling, Career Counselling, and Financial Inclusion. Proven experience in project planning and implementation, results-based monitoring, digital data collection (KoboToolbox & ODK), MIS, data quality assurance, storytelling and writing, reporting, donor compliance, and evidence-based decision-making.

Extensive experience in implementing programmes on livelihoods, economic empowerment, food security, governance, social accountability, education, SRHR, HIV/AIDS prevention, climate-resilient livelihoods, and community development, while building effective partnerships with government agencies, local government institutions, development partners, NGOs, private sector actors, financial institutions, employers, market actors, and community organizations. Sound knowledge of microfinance operations, including borrower verification, PAR and OTR management, screening checklists, credit risk assessment, and collaboration with MFIs to improve access to finance for entrepreneurs and vulnerable households.

A results-oriented and adaptable professional with strong leadership, stakeholder engagement, team coordination, analytical, facilitation, and problem-solving skills, committed to delivering high-quality, inclusive, and sustainable development outcomes through innovation, accountability, safeguarding (PSEA), GRM and continuous learning.
